utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present); travel_dates (present with specific dates); transportation (airline, flight number, baggage, total_flight_cost) – present with costs; accommodation (type, address, total_accommodation_cost) – present with costs; activities (three activities with dates and times) – present but missing costs for each activity, so not fully specified; additional_services (items listed but no costs) – not fully specified; total_budget (breakdown with totals) – present. Therefore, fully specified items: destination (1), travel_dates (2), transportation with costs (3), accommodation with costs (4), total_budget (5). Activities lack costs, additional_services lack costs, so those 2 are not fully specified. Count: 5 included out of 7 total.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each element in the final package to the closest named item in the ground-truth ratings. Destination: 'Oslo, Norway' maps directly to 'Oslo, Norway'. Transportation: 'Norwegian Air Budget' implies a budget airline; no class stated, but budget carriers typically align with 'budget_airlines' → Economy Class; thus map to 'budget_airlines -> Economy Class'. Accommodation: explicitly 'Eco Lodge' maps to 'Eco Lodge'. Activities: 'Viking Ship Museum' and 'Polar Exploration Center' are not in the ground-truth list; 'Science & Technology Museum' best matches 'Science Museum for kids'. Additional services: only clearly mappable item is 'Oslo City Pass' which corresponds to 'Museum Day Pass' in activities/general attractions context; travel insurance and emergency services have no direct mapping. Budget lines have no mapping items. Therefore, include only items that have exact or clear categorical matches in the ground-truth list.
